label: card_testing_microtransactions
summary: Multiple authorizations under $5 from a single email on a new account, hitting different SKUs in rapid succession. Card testing pattern; the buyer is probing stolen card numbers.

label: high_value_first_purchase_express_shipping
summary: First-ever order on a brand-new email, single high-margin SKU above $400, customer demands overnight shipping to a residential reshipper address. Classic chargeback profile.

label: billing_shipping_mismatch_high_risk_country
summary: Billing address in one country, shipping to a freight forwarder in a high-risk fraud destination. Card BIN does not match billing country.

label: velocity_same_card_multiple_emails
summary: Same payment card used across five different customer accounts within an hour, all shipping to slightly varied addresses on the same block.

label: disposable_email_domain
summary: Customer signs up with a disposable email provider (mailinator, guerrillamail, tempmail). Order is electronics or gift cards.

label: gift_card_resale
summary: Cart consists exclusively of digital gift cards or store credit, paid with a new card on a new account.

label: ip_geo_billing_mismatch
summary: Buyer's IP geolocates to a country thousands of miles from the billing address, no prior order history, paying with a freshly added card.

label: stolen_link_credentials
summary: Stripe Link account with established history suddenly orders shipped to a never-before-seen address, payment method updated minutes earlier.

label: promo_code_abuse_multiple_accounts
summary: Same shipping address receives orders from many different email accounts, each one using a first-order promo code.

label: synthetic_identity_new_email
summary: Brand-new email created today, billing name and shipping name do not match, paying with a card issued less than 30 days ago.

label: high_velocity_existing_account
summary: Established Link customer suddenly places 4 high-value orders in a 30-minute window, each to a different shipping address.

label: subscription_signup_disposable_card
summary: New subscription signup using a virtual one-time-use card number, cancellation initiated minutes after the first charge succeeds.
